prose:
Property: Dipole moment magnitude (Debye)
Level of theory: GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical tight-binding, no Gaussian basis)
Geometry provenance: user-supplied carbon_monoxide.xyz (2 atoms), single-point electrostatics calculation – no geometry relaxation.
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent)
Charge & multiplicity: 0, 1 (closed-shell singlet)
Software: xtb via chemkit electrostatics skill (see cli_invocation in JSON for exact command; live output was logged to the .out file created alongside the run).
Convergence & caveats: single-point evaluation; integrity check passed (partial charges sum to total charge). No warnings reported by the engine.

Headline result (as returned by chemkit, no rounding): 0.76350522 Debye.
